## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 95.6%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 95.5%. With regard to the 4.5% of flights that did not adhere, 3.1% were early and 1.4% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
